milestone: — the FIRST archived full-pipeline deep-init run (Detect→Extract→Filter→Verify→Redact→Emit→ADR), reading the REAL skill references
engine_proxy: isolated-subagent workflow, 4 sequential stages each reading the actual skill/references/*.md (). NOT a hand-written proxy — the real engine over real code.
graphify_note: Crystal has NO Graphify grammar → the run correctly fell through to the grep/ctags fallback (extraction_ladder.graphify=0). The canonical run thus also proves the graceful-degradation path (R8) end-to-end.
architecture_detected: Layered HTTP::Handler middleware-chain framework (Sinatra/Rack-style), MEDIUM confidence via Priority-2 directory heuristics (no ARCHITECTURE doc, no Graphify prior). 7 components: core/handlers/router/websocket/helpers/logging/ext.

pipeline_result.issues_note: 0 verified fires / 9 NAMED suppressions — matches the prior kemal field sweep + the precision-first thesis (a clean, mature framework should be silent-with-reasons, not flagged).

artifacts_written: AGENTS.md (lean root, 47 lines, owned-region + R3 provenance)
.ai/docs/decisions.md (6 grounded ADRs + knowledge log + open questions)
.ai/dashboard.html (24KB, self-contained vanilla JS, no external refs)

independent_validation.validated_by: the main loop, NOT the emitting agent (separation of duties)
independent_validation.agents_md_r9_note: the lean tier POINTS to issues.md ('0 fires; 9 suppressions') but contains NO ISS- defect — R9 honored.

cost_note.interpretation: A 4-stage full-pipeline proxy. Sits between the single-engine cache-realistic ~171k and the 12-subagent ~1.0M proxy in validation/cost/kemalcr-kemal.json — CORROBORATES the measured tier-S range ($1.3–$8.3), does not replace it. NOT a published $ figure (no input/output split + session_usage, not api_usage) → the clean api_usage S/M/L run stays the Track-E gate before any cost is published.

closes: (the product had NEVER been run end-to-end + archived) + TP-9/10/11 pieces (owned-region byte-preservation, SARIF validity, dashboard offline, redaction live). The first literal canonical proof that the engine runs end-to-end on real code.
pre_b1_emit_completeness_note: PRE-B1 ARTIFACT — recorded 2026-06-13, BEFORE backlog item B1 (the emit-completeness contract; , 2026-06-15) made nested <component>/AGENTS.md + the five horizontal docs DEFAULT-ON. kemal is a 7-component repo, so under the POST-B1 rule it would ALSO emit nested AGENTS.md for its substantial components + technical-dependencies/data-layer/domain-model/functional-workflows/cross-references.md. This archive emitted only the lean root + 7 deep component docs + decisions/issues.md — exactly the under-emit pattern B1 fixes ( cites this archive as B1's RED witness). It is retained UNCHANGED as the historical canonical proof AND as B1's RED evidence; it is NOT a conformant reference for the post-B1 contract, and §40 validates only its SARIF/dashboard/owned-region/citation invariants (deliberately NOT emit-completeness). A future re-run on the designed Graphify path will refresh it to the new contract + the §50 golden snapshot.
